subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond all mention and limitation, befitteth the Lord of existence and the Sovereign of the seen and unseen, Who through one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و حدود مالک وجود و سلطان غیب و شهود را لایق و سزاست که بیک
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @Word of God the cause of creation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
